name: RABBIT-FEATURE-BUG-4
title: Post-wave cleanup: rabbit-feature-new and rabbit-feature-audit skills not deployed; unrunnable invocation snippet; contract.md version drift; missing cross-feature locks
description:
Audit findings after BACKLOG-2/3:

1. CRITICAL: rabbit-feature-new and rabbit-feature-audit SKILL.md files are NOT deployed. .claude/features/contract/build-contract.json has copy-file entries for the other 3 skills (touch, scope, spec) but NOT for the 2 new ones. Result: .claude/skills/rabbit-feature-new/ and .claude/skills/rabbit-feature-audit/ do not exist - skills can't be invoked via the Skill tool. Add build-contract entries plus an e2e test analogous to test-build-source-points-to-rabbit-feature.py.

2. CRITICAL: Both new SKILL.md files document an unrunnable invocation using python3 -c with import_module('claude.features.contract.lib.checks'). That path is NOT a valid Python package (.claude has a leading dot). Replace with calls to the existing CLI script .claude/features/contract/scripts/validate-feature.py per the tool-choice tier (script > CLI > spec > prompt).

3. contract.md version drift: feature.json + spec.md at v1.6.0; docs/spec/contract.md still at v1.5.0. test-inv9-version-sync.py only compares feature.json vs spec.md, missing the third leg. Sync and extend the test.

4. contract.md invokes.scripts missing the new shell-out to .claude/features/rabbit-cage/scripts/new-feature.py. Inv 33 declares it; add to invokes.scripts plus a smoke test in test-cross-feature-interface.py.

5. contract.md reads.files missing the cross-feature library import .claude/features/contract/lib/checks.py.

6. SKILL.md cross-feature deferral note mentions RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG-24 but that backlog was closed scoped to validate-all.py only - file a new backlog item for the new-feature.py move and update the SKILL.md reference.
